the opposing strategy: financial attrition ("starve-out") it is clear from opposing counsel’s correspondence that they are utilizing a calculated financial attrition strategy designed to force a disabled, unrepresented spouse into an inequitable mediation settlement . the tactic: they are leveraging my strictly limited cpp-d income ($1,281.09/month) by withholding interim support, knowing i cannot survive while carrying the marital debt and housing costs . the damage: this tactic has successfully ruined my credit (dropping it approximately 100 points). enterprise rental deductions drained my bank account two months in a row because katherine’s sandbox insurance failed to cover the rental after she wrecked the bmw . i am now facing a $1,400 power bill and a $640 energy bill with zero means to pay them. the legal counter: we must frame this to the court not as a standard separation, but as extreme bad faith. they are weaponizing my poverty and my disability to force a surrender on property division and tracing exemptions .

Argument: Use... | ...esented spouse into an inequitable mediation settlement . The Tactic: They are leveraging my strictl...

paragraphs: the opposing strategy: financial attrition ("starve-out") it is clear from opposing counsel’s correspondence that they are utilizing a calculated financial attrition strategy designed to force a disabled, unrepresented spouse into an inequitable mediation settlement . the tactic: they are leveraging my strictly limited cpp-d income ($1,281.09/month) by withholding interim support, knowing i cannot survive while carrying the marital debt and housing costs . the damage: this tactic has successfully ruined my credit (dropping it approximately 100 points). enterprise rental deductions drained my bank account two months in a row because katherine’s sandbox insurance failed to cover the rental after she wrecked the bmw . i am now facing a $1,400 power bill and a $640 energy bill with zero means to pay them. the legal counter: we must frame this to the court not as a standard separation, but as extreme bad faith. they are weaponizing my poverty and my disability to force a surrender on property division and tracing exemptions .

the factual narrative: premeditated patient abandonment katherine was my primary caregiver for 5 years while i was bedbound . my severe health deterioration spans the last 8 years (chronic cluster headaches, spinal arthritis, and sciatic nerve damage) . in june 2025, i severely injured my back/sciatica moving equipment from our flooded studio, leaving me barely able to walk . her october 3rd departure was not a spontaneous reaction to an argument; it was a premeditated exit designed to leave me stranded and blindsided . the "trojan horse" meals: in her final week, she prepared and froze hellofresh meals to create the illusion of providing for me. however, she knew i was strictly restricted to a liquid diet due to my medical conditions . she planned for her clean getaway while leaving me with no consumable food. the vehicle sabotage: shortly before leaving via a text message, she totaled the bmw (while i suspect she was secretly moving items to her parents' house) . she then took the only remaining roadworthy vehicle (the kia, registered in my name), leaving a disabled, bereaved man without medical transportation .

the documented pattern: evading accountability katherine’s abrupt departure fits a long-documented pattern of avoiding accountability . when our co-owned studio business flooded with sewage twice, she refused to fulfill her operational responsibilities, forcing the physical and administrative burden onto my disabled shoulders . when we established transparency rules for our polyamorous relationship, she repeatedly violated them and avoided the necessary communications . when she decided to end our 16-year relationship, she did so with a text message and immediately hid behind her lawyer, refusing to engage in any transition planning for her disabled spouse .

proposed long-term strategic roadmap based on these facts, i believe our long-term strategy should follow these three phases. please let me know if you agree with this approach: phase 1: emergency triage & intervention (immediate) action: proceed immediately with the urgent chambers application for interim relief. objective: force the immediate return of the kia (or funds to re-plate/insure it), secure emergency interim spousal support, and stop the utility cutoffs. argument: use the "premeditated abandonment" narrative to show the court that katherine knowingly stranded a disabled man on a liquid diet, making judicial intervention a matter of immediate health and safety . phase 2: financial stabilization & debt clearance (short-term) action: demand immediate disclosure of katherine’s termination/severance package from inclusion saskatchewan. objective: prevent my credit from dropping further. we must aggressively propose that her lump-sum severance and the upcoming bmw insurance payout be used instantly to wipe out the high-interest joint marital debt and the enterprise collections account. argument: as the primary earner who orchestrated this financial crisis, her severance should be utilized to stop the financial bleeding for both of us, rather than being hoarded while i drown in utility arrears. phase 3: final settlement & protection of assets (long-term) action: proceed with the formal answer and counter-petition. objective: secure 24 months of exclusive home occupancy (while my said application processes), formalize the $2,000/month spousal support under the advisory guidelines, and enforce the tracing of my exempt inheritance. argument: because she swore a false property statement omitting my inheritance , and because she executed this separation in extreme bad faith, we should pursue an unequal division of property in my favor and demand that she pay my legal costs. i am fully prepared to follow your legal direction, but i wanted to ensure you had the complete psychological and strategic framework of how katherine operates. she avoids conflict until forced, which means we must apply firm legal pressure through the court to get any results. please let me know your thoughts on this roadmap, and kindly provide an update on the filing of the urgent chambers application. sincerely, christopher hallberg ____________________________ please note, this was a summary i had my ai in notebook llm create. i am trying to keep all evidence in there so it can generate reports for me, and ideally help do some of the legwork for us to reduce your workload in this. i have kept pictures of how she left the house when she left as well on my camera if we need them, i can take bank screenshots of the transactions that enterprise made, and my actual city power bill came yesterday and it is $1800. they will cut me off at the end of april it if is not paid. last month, i had to focus on left over cell phone bills and internet bills or i would have lost my way to communicate with the outside world. after paying the balance of those bills and purchasing ensure for the month, my bank account was overdrawn by $10. my cpp disability did not cover anywhere close to what i need. additionally, yesterday i got a letter from my bank saying she has transferred the mortgage payment fromour scotiabank account to her wealth simple account. she appears to have made some mortgage payments in the interim. i am not sure what her plan is here, but i wanted to advise you of it. chris

october 5, 2025 – acute bereavement & transportation crisis notified counsel of the sudden death of my stepfather in edmonton and my inability to attend the funeral because katherine took the kia after totalling the bmw.

october 6 & 8, 2025 – financial mitigation & said application notified counsel i placed holds on the mortgage and joint credit cards due to inability to pay. notified them i was pursuing a said application and that rental vehicles were booked out due to sgi claim backlogs. key opposing counsel threat: on oct 8, kristy oleksyn threatened to withdraw katherine's temporary mortgage assistance, falsely accusing me of "renting" the home to cary reid. i explicitly countered that cary was present strictly as a disability support worker/accommodation.

october 9, 2025 – comprehensive disclosure (the most important document) property & tracing: formally stated that i owned the marital home prior to the relationship, and that i used my father's inheritance for the down payment, home improvements, and paying off marital debt. spousal support & health insurance: officially requested 1,400–1,700/month in interim support for 24 months, citing the federal spousal support advisory guidelines and the 5.85:1 income disparity. also requested katherine maintain me on her employer health insurance to cover essential medical needs. caregiver/patient dynamic: documented that katherine was my primary caregiver from 2019–2024 while i was bedbound, severely impacting my earning capacity. exclusive occupancy & abandoned assets: requested 24 months of exclusive home occupancy as a medical necessity (saskatchewan human rights code accommodation) while my said application processes. set a 7-14 day ultimatum for the removal of abandoned studio items causing a "disability accommodation emergency".

october 10, 2025 – mediation refusal & property protection refused to select a mediator (lana wickstrom or demi peters) without first obtaining legal representation to prevent a power imbalance. stated that cary reid must be present to document the removal of any of katherine's items to protect the property inventory for mediation.

october 22, 2025 – emergency financial update notified counsel of impending utility cutoffs (595.32overdue)andscotiabankvisacollections(251.65 overdue) resulting from the lack of interim support. disclosed the evolution foods barter agreement delay ($2,610 value) caused by the separation timing, impacting my livelihood.

november 4, 2025 – notice of representation officially notified kristy oleksyn and valerie watson: "i have retained merchant law as my council. please reach out to them instead of me for this matter". (note: they flagrantly ignored this. they served me personally on january 19, 2026, and continued to email me directly as recently as february 23, 2026). please secure these threads from scharfstein llp so we can move forward with the emergency chambers application for interim support and exclusive occupancy based on the facts i have already put on their desk. sincerely, chris hallberg
